title: The Emporium Furniture Mod
description: A furniture and decor mod with a focus and emphasis on themed furniture and block sets!
body: **IT IS HIGHLY RECCOMENDED YOU USE JEI TO VIEW RECIPES FOR CERTAIN SETS!** ![New Fossil Set Expansion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c01b85f5ab88c74b7cd0c47b241301515d554ff.png) I ONLY post my newer mods and mod updates to Modrinth! If you see my mods being uploaded to other websites under my name, THAT IS AN IMPOSTER AND IT HAS BEEN DONE SO WITHOUT MY PERMISSION! PLEASE DO NOT REUPLOAD MY MODS TO OTHER WEBSITES!!! NEVER DOWNLOAD UNOFFICIAL REPOSTS OF MY MODS, AS I DO NOT ENDORSE THEM AND ESPECIALLY BECAUSE THEY COULD BE VIRUSES!!! The ONLY exception are mods hosted on Planet Minecraft with older versions of my mods as that is where I originally started out sharing them! I'm pleased to introduce The Emporium Mod, a furniture and decor mod with a focus and emphasis on themed furniture and block sets! Since most furniture mods cover the basic Minecraft materials such as wood planks and various stones, I thought I would like to make a furniture mod that could compliment those other types of furniture and decor with specific themes and color schemes! These sets are ALSO -fairly- easy to craft, as I also didn't want it to be ALL about looking for the materials to craft everything too.
